decisions.title: Approve SSO implementation pattern for Astrolab (IdP vs SP-initiated)
decisions.context: ENG-8157 requires IdP support for Astrolab SSO. Need to decide authentication flow architecture to unblock implementation and prevent ENG-8293 redirect loop issues in new auth system.

arguments.for: IdP-initiated flow improves enterprise customer experience, aligns with 'Embed Deeper' pillar by reducing friction in existing customer workflows
arguments.against: SP-initiated flow is simpler to implement and maintain, reduces risk of authentication loops like ENG-8293

decisions.title: Prioritize security documentation completion vs feature work
decisions.context: ENG-9308, ENG-9319, ENG-9320, ENG-9321, ENG-9322 represent critical security compliance work. Must decide resource allocation between compliance docs and Canvas/Explore V2 feature velocity.

arguments.for: Security compliance enables enterprise deals, directly supports 'Build the Moat' pillar by establishing trust infrastructure
arguments.against: Feature velocity on Canvas and Explore V2 drives 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' north star metric more directly

decisions.title: Commit to Files in CEL architecture (ENG-9337) before Explore V2 GA
decisions.context: ENG-9337 introduces files as core types in CEL. This is foundational for Python Rules and Explore V2 calculated channels. Architectural decision needed now to prevent rework.
decisions.blockedBy: Need clarity on Python Rules execution model and data governance requirements (ENG-9070)

arguments.for: Enables richer data transformations in Explore V2, accelerates 'Nail the Core' by unblocking calculated channels (ENG-9368, ENG-9387)
arguments.against: Adds complexity to CEL runtime, may impact performance of core query path

decisions.title: Standardize component refactoring approach for chart adapters
decisions.context: ENG-9367 proposes refactoring Rule Preview, Stats Preview, and Report chart adapter. Pattern decision affects Canvas and Explore V2 code maintainability.

arguments.for: Unified adapter reduces tech debt, improves Canvas embedding capability (Embed Deeper pillar)
arguments.against: Refactoring carries regression risk across multiple surfaces, delays feature work

decisions.title: Define K2 Mission data pipeline scope and ownership
decisions.context: ENG-9104 K2 Mission data pipeline implementation lacks clear scope. Affects Sift Edge product strategy and customer data volume capacity.

arguments.for: K2 Mission represents significant data volume opportunity, proves Sift Edge at scale
arguments.against: Custom pipeline work may not generalize, diverts resources from platform improvements

timeAudit.weekSummary: 11 critical bugs surfaced requiring triage. Security compliance work creating unplanned meeting overhead. Explore V2 GA timeline at risk.
alerts: 75% meeting load this week - only 8 free hours for deep work
11 P0/P1 bugs requiring urgent decisions across Canvas, Explore, and auth systems
5 security documentation items (ENG-9308, 9319, 9320, 9321, 9322) have no assigned DRI
ENG-9337 (Files in CEL) blocking path unclear - creates downstream risk for Python Rules
No scheduled time for architectural decisions on SSO (ENG-8157) or chart refactoring (ENG-9367)
